PETITIONERS AME WAUTERS, CAMILLA ROGERS AND SUZANE WAUTERS S.N. TRUST'S Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is OFF-CALENDAR. MATTER WILL BE HEARD AS PART OF LINE 11 ON THE JANUARY 14 LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR AT 9:30 A.M. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
